_comment: Hand-curated, committed reference dataset of well-established allergen cross-reactivity families (issue #153). Generic clinical reference data — NOT patient data, NOT medical advice. Each family lists the allergens that commonly cross-react, a short syndrome label, and a literature citation. Member names are lowercase for natural sentence rendering; `aliases` maps a member to alternate spellings/synonyms the matcher should also recognize. Matching is symmetric: any listed member present in a profile surfaces the family (the `label` carries the clinically-noted direction where it matters, e.g. latex -> fruit). Keys are aligned with the canonical allergen names produced by lib/allergy-ige.ts (extracted IgE analyte names) and documented allergy substances. Maintained by hand — add or refine families directly, keeping citations. See lib/supplement-catalog.ts for the curated-dataset precedent.

families.name: Birch pollen (oral allergy syndrome)
families.label: oral allergy syndrome, birch pollen (PR-10)
families.citation: Werfel T, et al. Position paper: Pollen-food syndrome. Allergy 2015;70:1079-1090.

families.name: Ragweed pollen (oral allergy syndrome)
families.label: oral allergy syndrome, ragweed pollen
families.citation: Enberg RN, et al. Ragweed-melon association. Ann Allergy 1987;58:59-63.

families.name: Mugwort pollen (celery-spice syndrome)
families.label: celery-mugwort-spice syndrome
families.citation: Wuthrich B, et al. Celery-carrot-mugwort-spice syndrome. Int Arch Allergy Immunol 1990;93:399-404.

families.name: Latex-fruit syndrome
families.label: latex-fruit syndrome (latex commonly cross-reacts with fruit)
families.citation: Blanco C, et al. Latex-fruit syndrome. Ann Allergy Asthma Immunol 1994;73:309-314.

families.name: Crustacean shellfish group
families.label: crustacean shellfish (shared tropomyosin)
families.citation: Lopata AL, et al. Shellfish allergy. Clin Exp Allergy 2010;40:850-858.

families.name: Mollusk shellfish group
families.label: mollusk shellfish (shared tropomyosin)
families.citation: Lopata AL, et al. Shellfish allergy. Clin Exp Allergy 2010;40:850-858.

families.name: Cashew / pistachio tree-nut cluster
families.label: cashew-pistachio tree-nut cluster
families.citation: Goetz DW, et al. Cashew-pistachio and walnut-pecan tree nut cross-reactivity. Ann Allergy Asthma Immunol 2005;95:45-52.

families.name: Walnut / pecan tree-nut cluster
families.label: walnut-pecan tree-nut cluster
families.citation: Goetz DW, et al. Cashew-pistachio and walnut-pecan tree nut cross-reactivity. Ann Allergy Asthma Immunol 2005;95:45-52.

families.name: Mammalian milk group
families.label: mammalian milk (cow, goat, sheep share caseins)
families.citation: Restani P, et al. Cross-reactivity between milk proteins from different animal species. Clin Exp Allergy 1999;29:997-1004.
